title: RCAN Audit Bundle v1.0
description: Signed envelope wrapping cert reports + EU AI Act packets + version-matrix snapshot for a single robot at a single point in time.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumps require a coordinated update across rcan-spec, opencastor-ops, RRF.

bundle_id.description: UUID4-derived bundle identifier. Globally unique. Generated by the aggregator.

rrn.description: Robot Registration Number this bundle attests for.

robot_md_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonicalized ROBOT.md the bundle is for. Pinpoints the manifest version under which artifacts were collected.

signed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the aggregator signed the bundle.

matrix_signed_at.description: Timestamp of the matrix snapshot included as an artifact.

jurisdiction_hint.description: Free-form jurisdiction marker (e.g. 'EU', 'US-CA', 'UK'). Informational only — never normative.

artifact_type.description: Discriminator. Adding a new type requires a schema MINOR bump.

schema_version.description: The artifact's own schema version (independent of bundle schema).

produced_at.description: When the artifact itself was produced (may be older than bundle's signed_at).

payload.description: Artifact body, shape governed by its own schema (see artifact_type-specific docs).

alg.description: Signature algorithm. v1.0 supports Ed25519 only; ML-DSA arrives in v2.0 alongside spec's hybrid crypto profile.

sig.description: Base64-encoded signature over the parent object's canonical-JSON serialization (excluding the signature field itself, recursively).
